canonical_yaml:
claim: falsify test suite has more than 400 test methods across tests/test_*.py
experiment:
  command: python3 claims/self/test_coverage_count/metric.py
  dataset: tests
  metric_fn: claims.self.test_coverage_count.metric:count_tests
falsification:
  failure_criteria:
  - direction: above
    metric: test_count
    threshold: 400
  minimum_sample_size: 1
  stopping_rule: fixed-n one walk of the tests/ directory
